summary: Episode 16: Restless with dreams of far lands, Tariq complained their district was ordinary. Salim taught him gratitude — that thankfulness for small blessings is what makes them grow — and showed him the warmth already around him. Noor, grateful for the anonymous gifts, left out a basket of bread in thanks to her unknown giver. Tariq is learning contentment. Noor still doesn't know who leaves the gifts at her door.
open_threads: Noor still doesn't know who leaves the anonymous gifts; she has now left bread in thanks
Tariq is learning gratitude and contentment alongside his dreams of travel
The traveler remains in the district, his deeper past still untold
Noor's courtyard reading circle keeps growing
